# CarShake — AI-powered car condition documentation
# https://carshake.online

## About
CarShake is a web-based tool that creates AI-verified, timestamped, GPS-tagged records of car condition before and after valet/garage parking. No app download needed — works entirely in the browser.

## Key features
- 60-second car scan (8 angles)
- QR code handover proof between owner and attendant
- AI-powered before/after comparison (Claude Vision)
- SHA-256 hashed, GPS-verified evidence packages
- Free plan: 3 scans/month
- Shield+ plan: $2.97/month for unlimited scans
